reasoning: Your power drop from 5-min to 20-min segments reveals poor lactate clearance and fatigue resistance. The last ride at 69% FTP was not enough to address this limiter. To prepare for the intense efforts of the Alpine Loop, we need workouts that strengthen your ability to sustain higher power outputs while managing lactate.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 x 12 minutes of 3min at 218W / 3min at 242W, 5min recovery between sets

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
